titleStmt.title: Yunfeng shan cliff inscription (1): Lun jing shu shi (雲峰山全套) (rubbing)
雲峰山刻石 — 論經書詩 (雲峰山全套)（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Yunfeng shan cliff inscription (1): Lun jing shu shi (雲峰山全套). GENUINE Zheng Daozhao. A third Berkeley rubbing of the Yunfeng shan Lun jing shu shi, from the 雲峰山全套 (complete Yunfeng shan set). record_url verified; specific image file not separately confirmed — use IIIF manifest. UC Berkeley EAL Chinese Rubbings Collection.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Northern Wei, 511. Creator 鄭道昭撰並書.

bibl.ref: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom, open access (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
